name: MSI B850 GAMING PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (B850GPW)
shortName: MSI B850 GAMING PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: MSI B850 ATX gaming motherboard with AM5 socket, PCIe 5.0 support, and Wi-Fi 7 for high-end AMD builds.
